title: DSA Widget Catalog
description: Living authoring reference for the D3.js interactive widget catalog used in the Data Structures and Algorithms book. Each chapter exhibits one widget with 3-5 representative payloads, the payload-schema reference card, and a source-frame to widget-step compression note. Used during the catalog-first migration arc (Arc 1) as the visual QA target, and afterward as the authoring lookup for Arc 3 chapter conversions.
